title: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026, Check Details & Apply -
how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026

paragraphs: BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani has issued a notification for the position of Junior Research Fellow. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 07 June 2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the BITS Pilani Recruitment 2026 is provided below.
